ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apc_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "apc_paid" REAL /* Amount paid for the APC including VAT if charged */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the article */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the APC payment was made */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution making the payment */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal of publication */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the publication */,
  "pubmed_id" TEXT /* PubMed ID of the article */,
  "tco_year" INTEGER /* Total Cost of Ownership year */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, review) */,
  "drop_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the payment should be dropped */,
  "payment_period" INTEGER /* Period of APC payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_receipt" TEXT /* Receipt for the payment */,
  "apc_currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the APC payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apc_payments_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apc_payments_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apc_payments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Full name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution */,
  "institution_department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "journal_issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "journal_eissn" TEXT /* eISSN of the journal */,
  "journal_category" TEXT /* Category of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "publisher_type" TEXT /* Type of publisher */,
  "publisher_country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "license_version" TEXT /* Version of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pubmed_articles" (
  "pubmed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PubMed article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal in which the article was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "article_abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "article_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pubmed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pubmed_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_records" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment related to the accessed article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the article was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_records_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES apc_payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Amount paid for the APC including VAT if charged

Country where the publisher is based

Reference to the journal in which the article was published
